items.definition_en: A connection is a feeling of being close to someone.
items.example_en: She felt a strong connection with her friends.

items.definition_en: Awkwardness is the feeling of being uncomfortable in a social situation.
items.example_en: There was some awkwardness during their first meeting.

items.definition_en: Closeness is the feeling of being emotionally near someone.
items.example_en: Closeness helps to build strong relationships.

items.definition_en: Doubt is the feeling of not being sure about something.
items.example_en: He felt doubt about his decision after talking to her.

items.definition_en: Attraction is the feeling of liking someone in a special way.
items.example_en: There was a clear attraction between them at the party.

items.definition_en: Respect is the feeling that someone is important or valuable.
items.example_en: She has great respect for her teacher.

items.definition_en: Suspicion is the feeling that someone might be guilty of something.
items.example_en: He watched his neighbor with suspicion.

items.definition_en: Support is the feeling of being helped by others.
items.example_en: He got a lot of support from his family.

items.definition_en: Sympathy is the feeling of caring about someone else's trouble.
items.example_en: They showed their sympathy after she lost her job.

items.definition_en: Admiration is the feeling of liking and respecting someone.
items.example_en: She has admiration for talented artists.

items.definition_en: Caring is the feeling of wanting to help someone.
items.example_en: He shows caring for his friends every day.

items.definition_en: Surprise is the feeling when something unexpected happens.
items.example_en: She felt great surprise when she saw him.

items.definition_en: Appreciation is the feeling of being thankful and showing it.
items.example_en: He showed his appreciation with a smile.

items.definition_en: Rejection is the feeling when someone does not accept you.
items.example_en: She felt rejection after not making the team.

items.definition_en: Acceptance is the feeling that you are included by others.
items.example_en: He found acceptance among his new classmates.

items.definition_en: Disconnect is the feeling when people are not close or together.
items.example_en: There is a disconnect between the two families.

items.definition_en: Welcoming is the feeling of being friendly to others.
items.example_en: Her welcoming made me feel at home.

items.definition_en: Tension is the feeling of stress between people.
items.example_en: There was tension during the meeting.
